name: flow-05-completion-gate
description: T98 LearningFlowCompleted orchestration gate. Gates on Branch A only (T85+T96+T87). Branch B and C emit their own events independently.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: 'LearningFlowCompleted' MACHINE literal, Branch A gate only
Retrieve plan-flow05-completion-gamification PLAN_EXEMPLAR for completion gate topology
Break into: await Branch A (T85 committed + T96 done + T87 done) → emit LearningFlowCompleted. Branch B and C run independently.
Generate learning-flow-completed.service.ts (T98). Gate condition = Branch A complete. 'LearningFlowCompleted' as const MACHINE literal.
Score against iron rules: MACHINE literal, Branch A gate, Branches B+C not in gate
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
